title: Croatian Pancake Breakfast
description: A hearty breakfast featuring croatian pancakes, fresh spinach, and a peppery kick. Perfect for a weekend morning.
instructions: 1. Cook the croatian pancakes according to the package instructions.
2. In a pan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped chives and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
4. Add the fresh spinach to the pan and cook until wilted.
5. Serve the spinach mixture on top of the cooked pancakes.
6. Drizzle with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
